title: TAX INCREMENT DEVELOPMENT CORPORATIONS
doc_html:
SUBTITLE IX.  DEVELOPMENT FINANCING

CHAPTER 1.  TAX INCREMENT DEVELOPMENT CORPORATIONS

§8001.  Short title

This Chapter may be referred to as the "Tax Increment Development Act".  

Acts 1988, No. 996, §1.
